reference: It's just getting into the summer months, and I have started sneezing. After a sneezing fit today, I have developed an irritation toward the back of my throat. It kind of feels like it's near the roof of my throat too. It's really irritating when swallowing, and I can feel it there all the time. I can't stand it. I have it whenever there is a stark change in weather conditions, and I've always wondered what it is.
text: It's just getting to the summer months and I have started sneezing. After a sneezing fit today, I have developed an irritation toward the back of my throat. It kind of feels like it's near the roof of my throat too. It's really irritating when swallowing and I can feel it there all the time. I can't stand it. I have it whenever there is a stark change in weather conditions and I've always wondered what it is.
